title: lobivia maximiliana var. intermedia
intro: Lobivia maximiliana var. intermedia is a variety of the Lobivia maximiliana cactus, specifically a type of flowering cactus native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lobivia maximiliana var. intermedia include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Lobivia maximiliana var. intermedia may include teas, tinctures, and infusions made from its flowers, stems, or roots, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
